name: open-source-starter-lab
description: A beginner-friendly lab for learning Git, GitHub, issues, pull requests, and open-source contribution workflows.

scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js check --profile beginner
scripts.automation:health: npm run build && node dist/scripts/createDailyIssue.js --dry-run && node dist/scripts/createWeeklyHelpDiscussion.js --dry-run && node dist/scripts/replyToAssignmentRequest.js --dry-run && node dist/scripts/welcomePullRequest.js --dry-run && node dist/scripts/afterMergeContributorProof.js --dry-run && node dist/scripts/generateMaintainerDashboard.js --dry-run
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/tests/smoke.test.js && node dist/tests/cli.test.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run demo

author: Syed Abdul Aman
